channel.title: Tag1 on Terminal
channel.description: Recent content in Tag1 on Terminal

item.title: I need to stop...
item.description:
First

Hi this will probably be the most embarrassing blog of my life My name is razael people call me el, zael

Get started

To start with, I’ll just tell you about my complaint of constantly watching porn.

If I remember from the age of 6 I started looking at porn, I know you might ask ==how can you at the age of 6 already know adult content== it’s strange but if I’m not mistaken there are my friends and of course social effects too like youtube etc.
